title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 09 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.49% today, the main contract closed 823.The traders' willingness to shipis general.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is better .PBF at Shandong port deal 820-825 yuan/mt,decrease 15-20 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 825-830 yuan/mt,decrease 15-20 yuan/mt. From a macro perspective, the price of iron ore has risen rapidly in the near future. The National Development and Reform Commission announced that it will pay close attention to the change of iron ore market price, strengthen supervision and ensure the stable operation of iron ore price, and the price of iron ore will fall back.
